initial_program:
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).

all5col(C) :- #count{ R : input(R, C, 5) } = N.

Sep1 = #min{ C : all5col(C) }.
Sep2 = #max{ C : all5col(C) }.

:- all5col(K), K != Sep1, K != Sep2.
:- all5col(K), K < Sep1.
:- all5col(K), Sep1 < K, K < Sep2.
:- all5col(K), Sep2 < K.
:- Sep1 < Sep2.

repLeft = Sep1 - 2.
repMid = Sep2 - 2.
repRight = Sep2 + 2.

:- repLeft >= 0, repLeft < M.
:- repMid >= 0, repMid < M.
:- repRight >= 0, repRight < M.
:- repLeft != Sep1, repLeft != Sep2.
:- repMid != Sep1, repMid != Sep2.
:- repRight != Sep1, repRight != Sep2.
:- repLeft != repMid, repLeft != repRight, repMid != repRight.

midRow = N / 2.

OffTL = #max{ V : R, input(R, repLeft, V), V != 0, V != 5, R <= midRow }.
OffTM = #max{ V : R, input(R, repMid, V), V != 0, V != 5, R <= midRow }.
OffTR = #max{ V : R, input(R, repRight, V), V != 0, V != 5, R <= midRow }.

OffBL = #max{ V : R, input(R, repLeft, V), V != 0, V != 5, R >= midRow }.
OffBM = #max{ V : R, input(R, repMid, V), V != 0, V != 5, R >= midRow }.
OffBR = #max{ V : R, input(R, repRight, V), V != 0, V != 5, R >= midRow }.

output(R,C,5) :- output_cell(R,C), col(C), C = Sep1.
output(R,C,5) :- output_cell(R,C), col(C), C = Sep2.

output(R,C,Color) :- output_cell(R,C), col(C), C < Sep1, R <= midRow, Color = 5 + OffTL.
output(R,C,Color) :- output_cell(R,C), col(C), C < Sep1, R > midRow, Color = 5 + OffBL.

output(R,C,Color) :- output_cell(R,C), col(C), Sep1 < C, C < Sep2, R <= midRow, Color = 5 + OffTM.
output(R,C,Color) :- output_cell(R,C), col(C), Sep1 < C, C < Sep2, R > midRow, Color = 5 + OffBM.

output(R,C,Color) :- output_cell(R,C), col(C), C > Sep2, R <= midRow, Color = 5 + OffTR.
output(R,C,Color) :- output_cell(R,C), col(C), C > Sep2, R > midRow, Color = 5 + OffBR.

#show output/3.

n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).

all5col(C) :- #count{ R : input(R, C, 5) } = N.

Sep1 = #min{ C : all5col(C) }.
Sep2 = #max{ C : all5col(C) }.

:- all5col(K), K != Sep1, K != Sep2.
:- all5col(K), K < Sep1.
:- all5col(K), Sep1 < K, K < Sep2.
:- all5col(K), Sep2 < K.
:- Sep1 < Sep2.

repLeft = Sep1 - 2.

repRight = Sep2 + 2.

:- repLeft >= 0, repLeft < M.
:- repMid >= 0, repMid < M.
:- repRight >= 0, repRight < M.
:- repLeft != Sep1, repLeft != Sep2.
:- repMid != Sep1, repMid != Sep2.
:- repRight != Sep1, repRight != Sep2.
:- repLeft != repMid, repLeft != repRight, repMid != repRight.

midRow = N / 2.

OffTL = #max{R : input(R, repLeft, V), V != 0, V != 5, R <= midRow }.
OffBM = #max{R : input(R, repMid, V), V != 0, V != 5, R >= midRow }.

OffBR = #max{R : input(R, repRight, V), V != 0, V != 5, R >= midRow }.

output(R,C,5) :- output_cell(R,C), col(C), C = Sep1.
output(R,C,5) :- output_cell(R,C), col(C), C = Sep2.

output(R,C,Color) :- output_cell(R,C), col(C), C < Sep1, R > midRow, Color = 5 + OffBL.

n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).

all5col(C) :- #count{ R : input(R, C, 5) } = N.

Sep1 = #min{ C : all5col(C) }.
Sep2 = #max{ C : all5col(C) }.

:- all5col(K), K != Sep1, K != Sep2.
:- all5col(K), K < Sep1.
:- all5col(K), Sep1 < K, K < Sep2.
:- all5col(K), Sep2 < K.
:- Sep1 < Sep2.

repLeft = Sep1 - 2.
repMid = Sep2 - 2.
repRight = Sep2 + 2.

:- repMid >= 0, repMid < M.
:- repRight >= 0, repRight < M.

output(R,C,5) :- output_cell(R,C), col(C), C = Sep1.
output(R,C,5) :- output_cell(R,C), col(C), C = Sep2.

output(R,C,Color) :- output_cell(R,C), col(C), C < Sep1, R <= midRow, Color = 5 + OffTL.
output(R,C,Color) :- output_cell(R,C), col(C), C < Sep1, R > midRow, Color = 5 + OffBL.

output(R,C,Color) :- output_cell(R,C), col(C), Sep1 < C, C < Sep2, R <= midRow, Color = 5 + OffTM.
output(R,C,Color) :- output_cell(R,C), col(C), Sep1 < C, C < Sep2, R > midRow, Color = 5 + OffBM.

output(R,C,Color) :- output_cell(R,C), col(C), C > Sep2, R <= midRow, Color = 5 + OffTR.
output(R,C,Color) :- output_cell(R,C), col(C), C > Sep2, R > midRow, Color = 5 + OffBR.
